title: A Unified and General Humanoid Whole-Body Controller for Fine-Grained Locomotion
abstract: provide an in-depth analysis of how the various commands affect humanoid movement and offer insights into the relationships between these commands.To our knowledge, HUGWBC is the first humanoid whole-body controller that supports such versatile locomotion behaviors with high robustness and flexibility.
